name: lab3-nexus
description: Utility Monitoring Dashboard for Apartment Complexes

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.db:init: docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d energy_dashboard -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d energy_dashboard -f /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/02-seed.sql
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS energy_dashboard;' && docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -c 'CREATE DATABASE energy_dashboard;' && npm run db:init && npm run db:seed
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && amplify publish
